# Phase 2 of #11599: AGENTS_ATLAS.md heading conversion + AGENTS.md cross-ref simplification

## Context

Operator V-B-A 2026-05-18 ~23:45Z surfaced friction in the Phase 1 → Phase 2 boundary state:

> *"follow up for 11600 => semantic anchors in agents.md => not matched inside the atlas. mapping to e.g. §2 in atlas => friction. is the atlas uses the same tags => no mentions even needed."*

After PR #11600 (Phase 1) lands, `AGENTS.md` uses `## §semantic_concept_name` headings (15 conversions). But `AGENTS_ATLAS.md` retains positional `## N. Title [TAG]` headings. The cross-references from AGENTS.md → ATLAS still use positional `§N` form (e.g., `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §2`), which is the exact failure mode ADR 0011 §2.5 substrate-wide heading-form convention was designed to eliminate.

Per ADR 0011 §2.5: *"the SAME `§semantic_concept_name` identifier is also the canonical HEADING form across all agent content. The heading IS the anchor; descriptive prose lives in the section body, not in the heading itself."*

If ATLAS uses the same `§<semantic>` form, AGENTS.md cross-references simplify: the bare `§<semantic>` token resolves substrate-wide; the `AGENTS_ATLAS.md` filename prefix becomes unnecessary.

## Empirical anchor (current state on PR #11600 head `f170f1df9`)

AGENTS.md has 7 AGENTS_ATLAS occurrences post-compaction (reduced from 16 in `f170f1df9`). Of these, 4 are filename+§ cross-refs that route to specific ATLAS sections:

```
AGENTS.md:12  Atlas detail: `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §2`           → §anti_hallucination_policy
AGENTS.md:46  atlas_detail: `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §0.2 ...`     → §cross_family_cascade_clause
AGENTS.md:66  empirical anchor: `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §2`       → §anti_hallucination_policy
AGENTS.md:97  Atlas detail: `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §2`           → §anti_hallucination_policy
```

ATLAS structure (149 lines, ~24 top-level positional headings):
```
## 0.1. Harness-Scoped Operational Notes [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 0.2. INV1 Cross-Family Cascade Clause [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 1. Communication Style & Pipeline Authority [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 2. The Anti-Hallucination Policy [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 4.3 Protocol for Recovering from Un-savable Turns [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 5. The Strategic Co-Founder Protocol (Active Context Mutation) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 6. Request Triage [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 7. The Pull Request Mandate (Definition of Done) [MACHINE-ENFORCEABLE-CANDIDATE]
## 8. The Resumption Protocol (Interruption Amnesia) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 9. Reading Modified Files Efficiently (State Management) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 10. Testing and Validation Protocol [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 12. Coding Syntax Constraints (ES6+) [MACHINE-ENFORCEABLE-CANDIDATE]
## 13.1. Contributions Over Commits — Substrate-Quality Heuristics [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 13.3. PR Diff === PR Body (Memory Anchor) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 14. The A2A Contextual Bridge Protocol (End of Session Handoff) [MACHINE-ENFORCEABLE-CANDIDATE]
## 15. The Knowledge Base: Your Primary Source of Truth [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 16. The Implementation Loop [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 17. The Virtuous Cycle [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 18. Session Maintenance [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 19. Working with Sub-Agents [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 20. The Visual Verification Protocol (Frontend UI/Layout Tasks) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 21. Lead-Role Baton Intake (Validation & Constraints) [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
## 22. Authoring Discipline: Sibling-File Lift [DISCIPLINE-ONLY]
```

## Scope

1. **Convert ATLAS headings** to `## §semantic_concept_name [TAG]` form (preserves [DISCIPLINE-ONLY] / [MACHINE-ENFORCEABLE-CANDIDATE] tags). ~24 conversions.
2. **Convert internal ATLAS cross-refs** (refs from ATLAS to itself + to AGENTS.md / skills / etc.) to `§<semantic>` form per ADR 0011 §2.5.
3. **Simplify AGENTS.md cross-refs** to ATLAS sections — drop `AGENTS_ATLAS.md` filename prefix since the semantic anchor IS the substrate-wide identifier. 4 lines in AGENTS.md affected.
4. **Naming discipline**: when ATLAS section elaborates an AGENTS.md concept (e.g., `## 13.1. Contributions Over Commits — Substrate-Quality Heuristics` elaborates AGENTS.md `§contributions_over_commits`), name ATLAS heading with a disambiguating suffix (e.g., `§contributions_over_commits_heuristics`) rather than collide.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All ~24 ATLAS headings in `## §semantic_concept_name [TAG]` form
- [ ] Internal ATLAS cross-refs use `§<semantic>` form (no positional `§N` survivors unless historical archaeology classified per ADR 0011 §2.3)
- [ ] AGENTS.md cross-refs to ATLAS simplified (drop filename prefix where the §anchor is substrate-wide)
- [ ] `node ai/scripts/lint-agents.mjs --base origin/dev` → OK (no anchor-tag regressions)
- [ ] `node ai/scripts/check-substrate-size.mjs` → PASS (AGENTS.md + ANTIGRAVITY_RULES.md under 24,576 cap)
- [ ] No name collisions between AGENTS.md `§<semantic>` and ATLAS `§<semantic>` (disambiguating suffixes where AGENTS.md concept is elaborated in ATLAS)
- [ ] Cross-family review by @neo-gpt

## Out of scope (deferred to Phase 3-5)

- `AGENTS_STARTUP.md` (Phase 2 originally per #11599 also includes this — could split or keep)
- `.agents/skills/**/*.md` (Phase 3)
- `learn/agentos/**/*.md` non-ATLAS files (Phase 4)
- Code JSDoc cross-references (Phase 5)

## Empirical anchor for ordering

Phase 1 (PR #11600) creates the substrate-correctness asymmetry; Phase 2 closes it. Without Phase 2, AGENTS.md → ATLAS cross-refs are friction-inducing positional pointers — the exact failure mode ADR 0011 was designed to eliminate. Phase 2 is high-priority follow-up to Phase 1 merge.

## Related

- **Parent epic:** [#11599](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/11599) — Substrate-wide heading-form convention (5 phases)
- **Phase 1 PR:** [#11600](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11600) — surfaces this friction empirically post-conversion
- **Substrate authority:** ADR 0011 §2.5 (substrate-wide heading-form convention, amended in [#11600](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11600))
- **Operator-direction:** in-session 2026-05-18 ~23:45Z (V-B-A on Phase 1/Phase 2 substrate-asymmetry; "no mentions even needed" framing for cross-substrate semantic-anchor routing)

## Priority

Team to triage. Filed per operator-direction (knowledge-substrate creation independent of priorization, per `feedback_friction_tickets_before_priorization`).

- 2026-05-19T06:34:07Z @tobiu referenced in commit `c830ade` - "feat(agentos): Phase 2 substrate-wide §semantic_concept_name heading form in AGENTS_ATLAS.md (#11608) (#11614)

Continues Phase 1 (#11600 / 0c0edb681) substrate-wide ADR 0011 §2.5 heading-form
convention into AGENTS_ATLAS.md, AGENTS.md cross-refs, and AGENTS_STARTUP.md cross-refs.

Changes:

- 23 AGENTS_ATLAS.md headings converted from positional `## N. Title [TAG]` →
  semantic `## §<semantic> [TAG]`. Preserves [DISCIPLINE-ONLY] /
  [MACHINE-ENFORCEABLE-CANDIDATE] tags. Disambiguating suffixes applied where
  ATLAS section elaborates an AGENTS.md concept:
  - ATLAS §13.1 → §contributions_over_commits_heuristics (AGENTS.md has §contributions_over_commits)
  - ATLAS §13.3 → §pr_diff_equals_pr_body_anchor (AGENTS.md has §pr_diff_equals_pr_body)
- ATLAS internal cross-refs updated to AGENTS.md §semantic targets (V-B-A
  §verify_before_assert, friction → gold §friction_to_gold, §critical_gates
  invariants, §contributions_over_commits, §neo_identity_anchor,
  §swarm_topology_anchor, §self_evolving_systems substrate-accretion).
- AGENTS.md cross-refs to ATLAS sections simplified (drop `AGENTS_ATLAS.md`
  filename prefix where §anchor is substrate-wide). 4 atlas_detail / §2 refs
  + §edge_case_triggers positional §N refs converted to §<semantic>.
- AGENTS_STARTUP.md cross-refs to ATLAS sections similarly simplified (Inv 1
  mirror + Strategic Workflows §15.3 ref).

Pre-existing trailing whitespace at AGENTS_STARTUP.md:25 and AGENTS_ATLAS.md:144
(originally line 144, line continuity from pre-Phase-2) cleaned up incidentally
to clear husky pre-commit gate.

Substrate authority: ADR 0011 §2.5 (substrate-wide heading-form convention).

Verification:
- node ai/scripts/lint-agents.mjs --base origin/dev → OK
- node ai/scripts/check-substrate-size.mjs → AGENTS.md 20997 / 24576 bytes (PASS)
- node buildScripts/util/check-whitespace.mjs → PASS
- git diff --check → PASS

Out of scope (deferred per #11599 epic phases):
- AGENTS_STARTUP.md heading conversion — positional §N self-headings remain;
  external skill refs to AGENTS_STARTUP.md §3.3 / §6 are already stale and
  warrant a separate substrate-correction pass
- .agents/skills/**/*.md (Phase 3)
- learn/agentos/**/*.md non-ATLAS files (Phase 4)
- Code JSDoc cross-references (Phase 5)
